generated_oml:
instance ExternalTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer for external environment temperature monitoring (accuracy ±0.5°C from -10°C to +85°C, unique 64-bit serial code)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance AirTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer for internal air temperature monitoring (accuracy ±0.5°C from -10°C to +85°C, unique 64-bit serial code)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance HeatbedTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer for heatbed temperature monitoring (accuracy ±0.5°C from -10°C to +85°C, unique 64-bit serial code)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ExternalTemperatureSensor, AirTemperatureSensor, HeatbedTemperatureSensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature readings from DS18S20 sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationService, TemperaturePredictionService, FaultDetectionService, StateEstimationService, SupervisoryControlService
]

instance ThermalModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic energy-based model with 2 parameters (C_air, G_box) assuming uniform air temperature and no heatbed thermal inertia"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationService, TemperaturePredictionService, SupervisoryControlService
]

instance ThermalModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic energy-based model with 4 parameters (C_heater, C_air, G_heater, G_box) including heatbed thermal dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationService, TemperaturePredictionService, SupervisoryControlService
]

instance HeatbedActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed control actuator using MOSFETs and optocouplers (4A current capability)"
]

instance FanActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan actuation control via Raspberry Pi GPIO via PCB (12V/24V operation)"
]

instance RabbitMQMessageBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for communication between physical components and virtual model"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService, CalibrationService, RealTimeMonitoringService, FaultDetectionService, StateEstimationService, SupervisoryControlService
]

instance RaspberryPiController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B hosting platform for digital twin execution"
]

instance PythonSoftwareStack : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python-based software stack for digital twin implementation"
]

instance ScipyOptimizationLibrary : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Scipy optimization library for model parameter calibration via non-linear least squares solver"
]

instance GitHubRepository : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "INTO-CPS-Association/example-incubator open-source GitHub repository"
]

instance TemperaturePredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for temperature prediction using thermal models"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePredictionInsight
]

instance CalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for model parameter optimization using experimental data"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelParametersOptimizedInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for real-time system monitoring of safety and optimality"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationInsight, SuboptimalPerformanceInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for fault detection in thermal incubator system"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectedInsight
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for state estimation of thermal system dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:provides StateEstimationInsight
]

instance SupervisoryControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for supervisory control to enhance physical system performance"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustHeatbedAction, AdjustFanAction
]

instance SafetyViolationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Safety violation detected in thermal incubator system"
]

instance SuboptimalPerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Suboptimal performance detected in thermal incubator system"
]

instance FaultDetectedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Fault detected in thermal incubator system"
]

instance StateEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated state of thermal incubator system"
]

instance TemperaturePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature value from simulation models"
]

instance ModelParametersOptimizedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized model parameters from calibration process"
]

instance AdjustHeatbedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of heatbed power based on DT analysis"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdjustFanAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of fan speed based on DT analysis"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance Container : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container with 0.03m³ air volume"
]

instance HeatbedComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Heatbed of physical dimensions 214×214×3mm"
]

instance FanComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Fan with airflow rate 0.02m³/s"
]

instance RaspberryPiComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B physical controller hardware"
]

instance PCBWithMOSFETs : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for current control"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply unit for thermal incubator system"
]

instance IncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Thermal incubator system environment"
    base:contains Container, HeatbedComponent, FanComponent, RaspberryPiComponent, PCBWithMOSFETs, PowerSupply, ExternalTemperatureSensor, AirTemperatureSensor, HeatbedTemperatureSensor, HeatbedActuator, FanActuator
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Controller sends actuation commands (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan speed control) via RabbitMQ to low-level driver, which executes hardware control using bang-bang parameters (UL, LL, H, C) to regulate temperature."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time control with fan airflow cycle of 2 seconds (0.03m³ volume / 0.02m³/s airflow); calibration performed offline using non-linear least squares optimization; controller parameters (H, C) operate on sub-second to second scales for thermal regulation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Centralized architecture with RabbitMQ server on Raspberry Pi, low-level driver handling sensor/actuator communication, controller implementing bang-bang logic, and simulation models for prediction; information flows via RabbitMQ between physical and virtual components as shown in Fig. 7."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase (as operated), integrating models into the deployed physical system for ongoing monitoring, prediction, and control after initial deployment."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Assumptions validated via experiments (e.g., temperature uniformity testing with three sensors); Model B validated for superior thermal inertia prediction; calibration minimizes residual error using Scipy's non-linear least squares solver with experimental trajectories."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker protocol for all communication between physical components (sensors, actuators) and virtual models, with RabbitMQ server running locally on Raspberry Pi for synchronization."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B hosts RabbitMQ server, low-level driver, controller software, and simulation models; all components deployed on-premises on the physical device."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Low-level driver incorporates safe protocol to maintain device safety; bang-bang controller enforces upper/lower temperature limits (UL, LL) to prevent overheating; no explicit cybersecurity measures detailed."
]
